summary: Verified premium hero brand lockup 'NEW LOOK BEAUTY PARLOUR' on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x800). All 11 spec requirements pass. Screenshots confirm luxury gold gradient text with sparkles, decorative lines and glow. Other hero content untouched.

checks_performed.text_content: PASS - 'New Look Beauty Parlour' rendered via uppercase transform
checks_performed.filter_glow: PASS - drop-shadow includes rgba(255,215,0,*) gold glow AND rgba(255,255,255,*) white outer glow, plus black+white embossed shadows
checks_performed.decorative_lines: PASS - exactly 2 .brand-line each 200px wide with linear-gradient containing #D4AF37/#FFD700
checks_performed.sparkles: PASS - exactly 2 .brand-sparkle with '✦', one at each end
checks_performed.centering: PASS - lockup center at x=960 (viewport 1920), diff=0px
checks_performed.mobile: PASS - 13px font-size, height 19.5px, no horizontal overflow (right=366 < viewport 390), 2 lines and 2 sparkles visible
checks_performed.entrance_animation: PASS - after 5s wait, lockup opacity=1, transform=none
checks_performed.other_hero_content: PASS - h1 'Where beauty meets perfection.' visible, all 4 CTAs (book, whatsapp, call, maps) present, navbar intact
checks_performed.console: Only pre-existing sanity/image-url deprecation warning and framer-motion scroll offset warning; no errors

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: framer-motion warning 'container has non-static position' from useScroll — hero section has 'relative' class so this is likely a false positive during animation frames; not blocking.
Minor: @sanity/image-url default export deprecation — non-blocking, cosmetic.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero brand lockup fully implemented and passing. Backend not tested (out of scope). Sanity hero.eyebrow returns 'New Look Beauty Parlour' (matches fallback).
